"use strict"; module.exports = function (it) { const { configName, importerName } = it; return ` "${configName}" is invalid syntax for a config specifier. * If your intention is to extend from a configuration exported from the plugin, add the configuration name after a slash: e.g. "${configName}/myConfig". * If this is the name of a shareable config instead of a plugin, remove the "plugin:" prefix: i.e. "${configName.slice("plugin:".length)}". "${configName}" was referenced from the config file in "${importerName}". If you still can't figure out the problem, please see https://eslint.org/docs/latest/use/troubleshooting. `.trimStart(); };
